/usr/bin/c++  -I/usr/include/SDL2 -D_REENTRANT -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ConsoleChess.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ConsoleChess.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ConsoleChess.dir/src/Piece.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ConsoleChess.dir/src/Board.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ConsoleChess.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ConsoleChess.dir/src/AI.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ConsoleChess.dir/src/Renderer.cpp.o -o ConsoleChess  -lSDL2 -lSDL2_ttf
